rulings.Case Title: PATRICE DARK ET AL VS. PAUL THIBEAULT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 03, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT PAUL THIBEAULT's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to November 2, 2017. rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN S.P. TURNER VS. PATRICIA MEGOWAN ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 03, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT PATRICIA MEGOWAN's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint GRANTED. Non-opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HECTOR BARRERA VS. RUSHMORE LOAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 03, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANT RUSHMORE LOAN MANAGEMENT SERVICES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Continued to November 2, 2017. No courtesy copies of opposition and complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDRIY KRAVCHUK VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Why A Preliminary Injuction Should Not Be Granted
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 03, 2017 line 4. Order To Show Cause Why A Preliminary Injuction Should Not Be Granted DENIED. Moving party failed to carry its burden and show a likelihood of prevailing on the merits, i.e. there is no evidence that Plaintiff followed the proper procedure to challenge the imposition of fines and there is no connection between the fined and defamation claims. Further, moving party has a remedy at law. = (501/REQ)
